---
title: "Vacancy"
---

I am looking for **self-motivated students** to join our group. If you are passionate about software engineering and AI, please read on!

---

### Graduate Students (PhD / Master by Research)

Applications for **Fall 2026** admission are now closed. However, if you are a very strong candidate, we may make exceptions on a case-by-case basis — please contact me at [zy25@ualberta.ca](mailto:zy25@ualberta.ca) with your CV and a brief description of your research interests.

---

### Current UofA Students

If you are a current University of Alberta student (e.g., a Master's student in the ECE Department, or an undergraduate) and are interested in conducting research in our group, please contact me at [zy25@ualberta.ca](mailto:zy25@ualberta.ca) with your CV.

---

### Undergraduate Individual Studies

If you are a UofA undergraduate interested in taking an individual study course (**CMPUT 399** or **CMPUT 499**), please contact me at [zy25@ualberta.ca](mailto:zy25@ualberta.ca) with your CV.

---

### Contact

For all inquiries, please reach out to [Prof. Zhou Yang](mailto:zhou.yang@ualberta.ca).
